You appear to have JavaScript disabled in your browser settings. You may find some parts of this website
do not work properly without it enabled. Parliamentary business
Find out what's on, track current bills, keep up with committees, watch live footage, access public records and follow topical issues. Discover the latest news in UK Parliament
Latest news from Parliament, House of Commons, House of Lords and committees at the palace of Westminster

House of Commons
The House of Commons is the democratically elected house of the UK Parliament, responsible for making laws and checking the work of Government
Commons Enquiry Service
What MPs do
Contacting your MP
House of Lords
The House of Lords is the second chamber of UK Parliament. It shares the task of making and shaping laws and checking and challenging the government's work
Lords news
What's on
Work of the House of Lords
Who's in the House of Lords

Committees
Committees at the House of Commons and the House of Lords consider policy issues, scrutinise the work of government, and examine proposals for legislation

chunks.text: Bill returns to the Lords JCNSS Chair responds to Atlantic Bastion announcement Guide to business Daily business Making laws Committees Parliament's role Search Parliamentary Material Search for parliamentary proceedings and publications since 1997. Use our advanced search tool to search by keyword, MP or Lord, date, proceeding or document type. Search Parliamentary Material Watch Debates British residents and overseas visitors can watch debates, including Prime Minister's Questions, from the public galleries in both Chambers. Watch Debates Watch Committees Committees, made up of MPs or Lords, examine issues in detail such as new legislation or topics like the economy. Watch democracy in action by attending a public committee session. Watch Committees Parliament's international work The UK Parliament works closely with other national and international parliaments and is an active member of various international parliamentary assemblies. Find out about Parliament's international work
